weekly picks (May 1 week 2026)

Posted on May 4, 2026 in 2026apr,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 May 1st week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score :
Unfold/Fold

05/04

  1. s41467-026-72807-9 Hydrogen site-dependent physical properties of hydrous magnesium silicates in the mantle transition zone (Nature Communications)

  2. 2605.00091v1 Locality versus Fock-space structure in East-type models (arXiv)

  3. 2605.00104v1 Criticality on R'enyi defects at (2+1)$d$ O(3) quantum critical points (arXiv)

  4. 2605.00137v1 Demonstration of a fermion Quadrupling Condensate via Quantum Monte Carlo Simulation (arXiv)

  5. 2605.00202v1 Observation of single antiferromagnetic magnon modes in the tunnelling transistors of spin-1/2 Kitaev system a-RuCl3 (arXiv)

  6. 2605.00211v1 Quantized Collective Fluctuations in Correlated Fermion Systems (arXiv)

  7. 2605.00274v1 Low-temperature Depletion of Superfluid Density in the Absence of Galilean Symmetry (arXiv)

  8. 2605.00304v1 Tailoring Mechanical Properties of Germanium Anodes via Metal Incorporation for Improved Cycle Stability (arXiv)

  9. 2605.00313v1 Beyond Structure: Revolutionising Materials Discovery via AI-Driven Synthesis Protocol-Property Relationships (arXiv)

  10. 2605.00325v1 Polarization-controlled effective Rabi dynamics in driven Graphene: A Floquet-Magnus approach (arXiv)

  11. 2605.00359v1 Investigation of nonlocal transport associated with the orbital Hall effect in Ti (arXiv)

  12. 2605.00427v1 Kinetically Arrested Twin-Domain State in Formamidinium Lead Iodide (arXiv)

  13. 2605.00441v1 Thermodynamic Charge Partition in Accumulation-Layer Heterostructures (arXiv)

  14. 2605.00477v1 Signatures of time-reversal-symmetry breaking in multiband 2H-TaS2 revealed by zero-field Josephson nonreciprocity (arXiv)

  15. 2605.00491v1 Electrical detection of spin-flip transition in metal/Na5Co15.5Te6O36 heterostructure (arXiv)

  16. 2605.00521v1 Induced discommensurations in the lock-in transition of charge-density waves (arXiv)

  17. 2605.00537v1 Magnetic Behavior of Ferro-, Antiferro-, and Ferrimagnetic Systems in the Griffiths Phase: A Theoretical Study (arXiv)

  18. 2605.00540v1 Incommensurate Magnetic Ordered Phase with Enhanced Low-Temperature Magnetic Specific Heat in SmAu$_3$Al$_7$ (arXiv)

  19. 2605.00543v1 Parity-dependent reentrant topology in a Su–Schrieffer–Heeger chain with power-law quasiperiodic modulation (arXiv)

  20. 2605.00544v1 An Unsupervised Machine Learning-based Framework for Wafer Scale Variability Analysis and Performance Prediction of Ferroelectric Hf0.5Zr0.5O2 Thin Film Capacitors (arXiv)

  21. 2605.00546v1 Exact Analytical Vortex Solution for a Two-Dimensional Quantum Gas with LHY Correction (arXiv)

  22. 2605.00567v1 Fixed points and crossovers for the hysteresis scaling of dynamic mean-field models (arXiv)

  23. 2605.00568v1 Dynamical magnetotropic susceptibility as a new probe of Kitaev materials and beyond (arXiv)

  24. 2605.00571v1 Quantum corrections to the Josephson dynamics: a population-imbalance approach (arXiv)

  25. 2605.00577v1 Long range proximity effects in planar structures involving the halfmetal ferromagnet La0.7Sr0.3MnO3 and Pt interlayers (arXiv)

  26. 2605.00596v1 Atomic Interferometry with Spin-Orbit-Coupled Spin-1 Condensates (arXiv)

  27. 2605.00599v1 Coordination-Induced Tuning of Ligand-Centered Red Emission in a cis-[Cd(Tz)2(py)2] Complex for Light-Emitting Diodes (arXiv)

  28. 2605.00601v1 Superconducting diode effect in correlated electron systems by nonreciprocal magnetism (arXiv)

  29. 2605.00609v1 Coordination Engineering of Dual-Atom Catalysts for Overall Water Splitting: Mechanistic Insights from Constant-Potential First-Principles and Machine Learning (arXiv)

  30. 2605.00611v1 Suppressing spin qubit decoherence during shuttling via confinement modulation (arXiv)

  31. 2605.00629v1 Monte Carlo study of the superfluid phase of $^4$He (arXiv)

  32. 2605.00639v1 Born-Qualified: An Autonomous Framework for Deploying Advanced Energy and Electronic Materials (arXiv)

  33. 2605.00656v1 Renormalized entropy production for optimal transport in jump processes: Make conservative forces optimal again (arXiv)

  34. 2605.00669v1 Experimental Evidence of Fractional Entropy in Critical Kondo Systems (arXiv)

  35. 2605.00679v1 Entropy transport through a superfluid quantum point contact: A Keldysh field-theory approach (arXiv)

  36. 2605.00732v1 Reconstruction of spin structures from topological charge distributions via generative neural network systems (arXiv)

  37. 2605.00802v1 Determination of Density Functional Tight Binding Models for Cerium Allotropes (arXiv)

  38. 2605.00815v1 Revealing the origin of XMCD in an altermagnet via three-dimensional control of spins (arXiv)

  39. 2511.00124v1 Cross-fluctuation phase transitions reveal sampling dynamics in diffusion models (arXiv)

  40. 2605.00017v1 Understanding Energy Flow and Inefficiency of a Thermomagnetic Generator by Transient Multi-Physics Modelling (arXiv)

  41. 2605.00094v1 Graph-theory measures capture weak ergodicity breaking on large quantum systems (arXiv)

  42. 2605.00096v1 Scalable spin-nematic squeezing in multi-level dipole-interacting Rydberg atom arrays (arXiv)

  43. 2605.00101v1 Nonreciprocity-enriched steady phases in open quantum systems (arXiv)

  44. 2605.00152v1 Optically detected nuclear magnetic resonance of carbon-13 in bulk diamond (arXiv)

  45. 2605.00435v1 Escaping Mode Collapse in LLM Generation via Geometric Regulation (arXiv)

  46. 2605.00575v1 Plasmon Induced Delocalized Second-Harmonic Generation Towards Buried-Interface Spectroscopy (arXiv)

  47. 2605.00576v1 High-pressure magnetic transition in iron observed via diamond quantum sensing (arXiv)

  49. 2605.00772v1 Entanglement capacity of complex networks from quantum walks (arXiv)
